reference_goals: Reinforced block/head casting — thicker walls, higher bolt preload pattern vs gasoline
Common-rail injection — rail manifold, injector well, high-pressure line routing
Turbocharger integration — turbine housing, compressor inlet, wastegate/VGT linkage
Gear timing train — idler/drive gear layout, timing case, fuel pump drive
Oil cooler and filter module — sandwich plate, thermostat valve, O-ring faces
Exhaust after-treatment interface — DPF/SCR mount bracket, sensor bosses
needed_metadata: BOM with material callouts (CGI vs gray iron block, forged steel crank)
Injection system pressure/flow spec (reference only, no calibration data)
Bolt pattern and preload table — head, main cap, flywheel
Cooling system capacity and flow path
needed_engineering_docs: Interface control — turbo flange bolt pattern, exhaust manifold gasket
Thermal boundary — EGT distribution, oil cooler duty cycle
Vibration/NVH — firing order, balancer shaft layout
safety_boundary: Cutaway/training reference only; no injection calibration maps, emissions tuning, or operating procedures.
